name: Model Trace and Evidence Trust Alignment Registry
doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
maturity: Expert-Derived V1 Trust Scoring Models, not statistically validated.

models.label: Universal Model Trace Inspector
models.purpose: Explain what score is shown, what model produced it, what evidence supports it, what is missing, what assumptions exist, confidence level, risk if wrong, and action consequence.

models.label: Evidence Trust Score
models.purpose: Score source credibility, freshness, completeness, relevance, chain of custody, human verification state, and conflict status.

models.label: Confidence Score
models.purpose: Represent confidence separately from trust. A claim can be trusted but low-confidence, or high-confidence but still high-risk.
